name: Bernaise Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Dry white wine or vermouth
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine vinegar, wine, shallots, and tarragon in a 2-cup glass measure.
2. Microwave, uncovered, at high for 1 to 2 minutes or until boiling.
3. Set aside to cool to lukewarm. Strain the mixture into a small bowl; whisk in egg yolks.
4. In a 2-cup glass measure or similar microwaveable bowl, melt butter at medium for 40 to 60 seconds. Do not boil.
5. Whisk egg yolk mixture into butter.
6. Microwave, uncovered, at medium for 30 to 90 seconds. Whisk every 15 seconds until the mixture starts to thicken.
7. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
